name: Hollow Ember
author: Asra
description: Warm ember and ash neumorphic theme. Deep near-black base with smouldering orange accent. inspired by Bad Omens – THE DEATH OF PEACE OF MIND

1.3.4: Fix: allow album-card box-shadow glow to render above album cards (overflow: visible).
Add breathing room for first row of album cards.
Normalize star rating rendering (emoji SVG adjusted and background-size set to 12x12).
